items.name: BritishBasketball
items.description:
Oi mate I'm bri'ish!
I've been enjoying my tea and biscuits, quite a brilliant dish if I would say so myself.
Many delinquents have told me to stop drinking so much tea, and to start drinking a bo'oh'o'wa'er.
I'd say that's a rubbish claim, tea is amazing! And no wa'er will beat the tastiness of tea.
*sips tea*

model and texture made by jgui7t7

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Shoes&Category=1&CreatorName=dubit&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

With a classic design and a robust build, these shoes are ready to tackle any adventure while keeping you looking great.
